title: Cronos Group Reports 2024 Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Results
text: Cronos Group reported full-year 2024 with net revenue of $117.6 million, up 35% year-over-year. Gross profit reached $25.2 million, up 112% year-over-year with gross margin improving to 21% from 14%. Net income was $40.0 million versus $70.4 million loss in 2023. Adjusted EBITDA improved to negative $34.9 million from negative $61.6 million. Cash position strengthened to $858.8 million. Q4 2024 specifically showed net revenue of $30.3 million, up 27% year-over-year with gross profit of $10.8 million versus $1.9 million in Q4 2023 and gross margin of 36%. Net income in Q4 was $43.9 million versus $45.2 million loss in Q4 2023. Spinach brand achieved Canada's number one cannabis brand position with 5.7% flower market share. SOURZ edible line captured 23% market share in Q4 with five products in Canada's top ten edibles. PEACE NATURALS achieved Israel's leading position at 24% market share and expanded to UK and Germany. Lord Jones ranked third best-selling chocolate brand in Canada with 9.6% market share. GrowCo expansion on track for Q2 2025 completion with $8.7 million operating expense savings achieved.
